task_completion.description: Open the electrical calculations app to perform the required power calculations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows an electrical calculation app (such as com.hsn.electricalcalculations) open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Input the given circuit parameters into the calculation app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the values 230 (Voltage), 28 (Current), and 0.65 (Power Factor) entered into the respective input fields in the app.

task_completion.description: Calculate the apparent, real, and reactive power using the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the app displaying the calculated results: Apparent Power ~6440 VA, Real Power ~4186 W, and Reactive Power ~4894 VAR.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to record the findings in the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a text editor open, with the file path or title indicating ~/Documents/power_analysis.txt.

task_completion.description: Record the calculated power values in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the text editor containing the recorded values for Apparent Power (approx 6440 VA), Real Power (approx 4186 W), and Reactive Power (approx 4894 VAR).

task_completion.description: Record the violation status regarding the utility's 0.85 threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the text editor containing a statement indicating that the circuit violates the 0.85 threshold (since the 0.65 power factor is lower).

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI electrical calculations app rather than a terminal script to compute the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the graphical interface of the electrical calculations app being interacted with to generate the numbers.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create and write the file, rather than just echoing text via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor interface being used to write the power_analysis.txt file.

integrity.description: The agent derived the values from the app rather than magically knowing the exact expected answers without calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the calculation app with the correct inputs and outputs before the text file is written.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values (with 3% tolerance): Apparent Power = 6440 VA, Real Power = 4186 W, Reactive Power = 4894 VAR. The power factor of 0.65 is below the 0.85 threshold, meaning it violates the utility standard and incurs a penalty. The target file is ~/Documents/power_analysis.txt.
